name: Butter Sauces#5
recipeIngredient: 3 teaspoons Fresh rosemary leaves, removed from the stem
1 tablespoon White wine OR orange juice OR lemon juice
1/4 teaspoon Crushed dried red chili pepper (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. To make each sauce, mix all the ingredients together well.
2. Melt the butter in a pan over medium heat until it is ready to serve.
